name: Anthracnose (Fruit)
affects: Papaya, FRT-MAN, Avocado, Guava, Banana / Vudi, Plantain, Dragon Fruit
families: Caricaceae, Anacardiaceae, Lauraceae, Myrtaceae, Musaceae, Cactaceae
symptoms: Attacks ripe fruit. Sunken brown spots that enlarge and result in rot as fruit ripens.
conditions: Warm humid conditions. Wounds and cracks on fruit surface.
control: Spray Mancozeb or Thiophanate-methyl before harvest. Handle fruit carefully. Dip in hot water (48C, 20 min).

name: Blossom End Rot (BER)
affects: Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Eggplant, Potato, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Watermelon, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin
symptoms: Water-soaked dark area at blossom end of fruit. Causes significant fruit loss.
conditions: Calcium deficiency. Sharp temperature change cold-hot. Extreme soil moisture fluctuations. Drought. Root damage.
control: Apply calcium foliar spray. Mulch to maintain soil moisture. Consistent irrigation. Avoid excessive nitrogen.

name: Leaf Spot (Lettuce / Cercospora)
affects: Lettuce, Capsicum, Chillies, Rourou / Bele, Amaranthus, Ota (Fern), Watercress, Chinese Cabbage, Coriander, Parsley, Mint, Herbs (General)
families: Asteraceae, Solanaceae, Amaranthaceae, Pteridophyte, Brassicaceae, Apiaceae, Lamiaceae
symptoms: Round to irregular spots with pale grey centres. When spots merge, can kill large leaf areas.
conditions: High humidity, wet leaves, splash dispersal, overcrowding.
control: Spray Chlorothalonil or Mancozeb. Avoid wetting foliage. Space plants for airflow. Remove infected leaves.

name: Bacterial Wilt (Solanaceae)
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato
symptoms: Sudden wilting of entire plant. Major problem where there is poor drainage and waterlogged conditions.
conditions: Ralstonia solanacearum bacteria. Poor drainage. High soil moisture. Alkaline soils.
control: No chemical cure. Remove and destroy infected plants. Improve drainage. Crop rotation (avoid Solanaceae 2+ years). Resistant varieties.

name: Powdery Mildew (Solanaceae / Cucurbit)
affects: Tomato, Chillies, Eggplant, Capsicum, Potato, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe
symptoms: White powdery spots on leaf surface, yellow then light brown under-leaf.
conditions: Dry conditions with high humidity. Low light. Poor airflow.
control: Spray Sulphur-based fungicide or Myclobutanil. Improve ventilation. Avoid water stress.

name: Soft Rot (Bacterial)
affects: Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Eggplant, Potato, Onion, Garlic, Spring Onion, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Cucumber, Carrot
symptoms: Infected fruit shrinks and hangs like water-filled bags. Tissue softens leaving sunken wrinkled skin.
conditions: Wounds, insect damage, waterlogging. Warm wet conditions.
control: Control insects to prevent wound entry. Improve drainage. Copper-based bactericide spray.

name: Black Sigatoka
affects: Banana / Vudi, Plantain
symptoms: Leaves die off before fruits mature. Severely reduces photosynthesis and yield.
conditions: High humidity, warm temperatures. Spore dispersal by wind and rain.
control: Cut and burn infected leaves immediately. Spray Mancozeb or Propiconazole. Ensure good drainage.

name: Sunburn / Heat Injury
affects: Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Eggplant, Potato, Watermelon, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Papaya
symptoms: Leaves fall prematurely exposing fruit. Fruits become yellow and unevenly ripe. White blistered injured areas on fruit.
conditions: Excessive sun exposure after leaf loss. High temperatures. Water stress.
control: Maintain good foliage cover. Shade cloth in extreme heat. Consistent irrigation to reduce stress.

name: Fruit Rot (Anthracnose / Phytophthora)
affects: Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Potato, Okra, Watermelon, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Papaya
symptoms: Dark brown water-soaked spots on fruit at any growth stage. Whitish mould develops in wet conditions. Infected fruits drop.
conditions: High humidity, warm temperatures, wounds from insects.
control: Spray Mancozeb or Copper oxychloride. Control insects. Improve airflow. Stake plants to prevent fruit contact with soil.

name: Damping Off / Basal Rot
affects: Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Radish, Watercress, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Eggplant, Potato, Lettuce, Cucumber, Gourd, Zucchini, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Okra, Onion, Garlic, Spring Onion, Carrot, Coriander, Parsley, Amaranthus
families: Brassicaceae, Solanaceae, Asteraceae, Cucurbitaceae, Malvaceae, Amaryllidaceae, Apiaceae, Amaranthaceae
symptoms: Seedlings attacked at soil level. White, grey or pale brown fungal web visible in morning. Older plants develop basal rot.
conditions: Overwatering, poor drainage, dense seeding, low light.
control: Use sterile media for seedlings. Drench with Thiram or Iprodione. Reduce irrigation. Improve drainage.

name: Root Knot Nematode
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Carrot, Radish, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Okra, Rourou / Bele, Amaranthus, Ota (Fern), Lettuce, Sweet Potato, Cassava, Dalo (Taro), Dalo ni Tana, CRP-URO, Yam, Ginger, Turmeric, Cardamom, Kawai / Jicama
families: Solanaceae, Apiaceae, Brassicaceae, Cucurbitaceae, Malvaceae, Amaranthaceae, Asteraceae, Convolvulaceae, Euphorbiaceae, Araceae, Dioscoreaceae, Zingiberaceae, Fabaceae, Pteridophyte
symptoms: Causes swelling (galls) on roots. Plants show wilting, yellowing and stunting despite adequate water.
conditions: Sandy soils. Warm conditions. Previous infected crops.
control: Soil solarisation before planting. Incorporate neem cake. Crop rotation with maize/grass. Use resistant varieties.

name: Powdery Mildew (Cucurbit)
affects: Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Capsicum, Chillies
symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves. Yellowing. Premature leaf drop.
conditions: Warm dry days, cool humid nights. High plant density.
control: Spray Sulphur fungicide or Triadimefon. Improve airflow. Avoid overhead irrigation.

name: Early Blight (Alternaria)
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Potato, Capsicum, Chillies
symptoms: Dark brown concentric rings on older leaves. Yellow halo. Defoliation from base up.
conditions: Warm wet conditions. Dense planting. Poor nutrition.
control: Mancozeb or Chlorothalonil spray. Crop rotation. Remove lower infected leaves.

name: Late Blight
affects: Tomato, Potato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies
symptoms: Water-soaked lesions on leaves and stems. White sporulation on undersides. Rapid collapse.
conditions: Cool wet conditions. Prolonged leaf wetness. High humidity.
control: Metalaxyl + Mancozeb. Copper fungicide. Plant resistant varieties. Avoid overhead water.

name: Bacterial Wilt (Tomato)
affects: Tomato, Eggplant, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato
symptoms: Sudden wilting without leaf yellowing. White bacterial ooze from cut stems in water.
conditions: High soil temperatures. Waterlogged conditions. Root damage.
control: No chemical cure. Use resistant varieties. Soil solarisation. Crop rotation >4 years.

name: Cassava Mosaic Disease
affects: Cassava
symptoms: Mosaic yellowing on young leaves. Leaf distortion. Stunted plant. Reduced tuber size.
conditions: High whitefly populations. Use of infected cuttings.
control: Plant certified virus-free cuttings. Control whiteflies (Imidacloprid). Rogue infected plants.

name: Ginger Rhizome Rot
affects: Ginger, Turmeric, Cardamom
symptoms: Yellowing and wilting from base. Soft watery rhizome rot. Foul smell. Crop collapse.
conditions: Waterlogged poorly drained soils. High temperatures. Infected seed rhizomes.
control: Plant on raised beds. Seed rhizome treatment (Ridomil). Remove and destroy affected clumps. Long rotation.

name: Sigatoka Leaf Spot
affects: Banana / Vudi, Plantain
symptoms: Yellow streaks evolving to brown/black necrotic patches. Leaf death. Reduced fruit fill.
conditions: Warm humid conditions. Poor drainage. Dense planting.
control: Propiconazole or Chlorothalonil spray. Remove old infected leaves. Improve airflow.

name: Panama Wilt (Fusarium TR4)
affects: Banana / Vudi, Plantain
symptoms: Yellow wilting of lower leaves. Internal brown/red discolouration of pseudostem. Plant death.
conditions: Infected soil. Movement of infected planting material.
control: No chemical cure. Plant Cavendish or TR4-resistant varieties. Soil fumigation. Strict hygiene.

name: Pineapple Heart Rot
affects: Pineapple
symptoms: Water-soaked centre leaves. Foul odour. Leaves pull out easily. Crown collapse.
conditions: Excess moisture in crown. Mechanical wounding. Poor drainage.
control: Avoid excessive irrigation to crown. Copper fungicide preventive. Improve drainage. Remove infected plants.

name: Damping Off (Nursery)
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Cabbage, Cauliflower, Chinese Cabbage, Lettuce, Cucumber, Watermelon, Squash / Pumpkin, Okra, Onion, Amaranthus, Coriander, Parsley
families: Solanaceae, Brassicaceae, Asteraceae, Cucurbitaceae, Malvaceae, Amaryllidaceae, Amaranthaceae, Apiaceae
symptoms: Seedlings collapse at soil level. Water-soaked stem base. Mass seedling death in nursery trays.
conditions: Overwatering. Poorly drained media. High humidity. Poor air circulation.
control: Sterile growing media. Reduce watering. Fungicide drench (Metalaxyl or Thiram). Improve ventilation.

name: Fusarium Wilt (Cucurbit)
affects: Watermelon, Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe
symptoms: Wilting and yellowing from one side. Brown discolouration inside stem. Plant death.
conditions: Infected soil. Monoculture. Warm temperatures.
control: Plant grafted seedlings on resistant rootstock. Avoid re-planting in infested soil. Long rotation.

name: Kava Dieback
affects: Kava
symptoms: Browning of leaf edges. Stem blackening. Dieback from tips. Root decay.
conditions: Waterlogged soils. Poor drainage. Mechanical damage.
control: Improve drainage. Remove affected stems. Copper fungicide. Avoid waterlogging.

name: Sweetpotato Viral Complex
affects: Sweet Potato
symptoms: Mosaic symptoms on leaves. Chlorotic spots. Reduced tuber yield. Premature aging.
conditions: Infected planting material. Aphid pressure. Warm conditions.
control: Use certified virus-free planting material. Control aphids. Remove infected plants.

name: Bean Rust
affects: French Beans, Long Bean, Winged Bean, Cowpea, Lablab Bean, Mung Bean, Pigeon Pea, Urd Bean, Kawai / Jicama, Peanut
symptoms: Rusty-brown pustules on leaves and pods. Defoliation. Reduced pod set.
conditions: Cool wet conditions. High humidity. Dense planting.
control: Spray Mancozeb or Triadimefon. Avoid overhead irrigation. Use resistant varieties.

name: Chilli / Capsicum Anthracnose
affects: Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Eggplant
symptoms: Sunken water-soaked lesions on fruit. Orange-pink spore masses. Post-harvest rot.
conditions: Warm wet weather. Mechanical wounds. Post-harvest conditions.
control: Spray Mancozeb or Carbendazim. Handle fruit carefully. Cold chain post-harvest.

name: Tobacco Mosaic Virus (TMV)
affects: Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Eggplant, Potato
symptoms: Mosaic yellowing. Leaf curl. Stunted growth. Internal browning of fruit.
conditions: Contact contamination. Mechanical operations. Infected tools.
control: Disinfect tools. Wash hands. No chemical cure. Remove infected plants. Use TMV-resistant varieties.

name: Cucumber Mosaic Virus (CMV)
affects: Cucumber, Zucchini, Gourd, Squash / Pumpkin, Watermelon, Capsicum, Chillies, Tomato, Eggplant, Potato, Rockmelon / Cantaloupe, Okra
symptoms: Mosaic mottling on leaves. Stunted plants. Distorted fruit.
conditions: High aphid populations. Weed reservoir hosts nearby.
control: Control aphids (Imidacloprid). Remove reservoir weeds. Use resistant varieties.

name: Leaf Curl Disease (Begomovirus)
pathogen: Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus / related Begomoviruses
affects: Eggplant, Tomato, Capsicum, Chillies, Potato, Okra
symptoms: Upward/downward leaf curl. Yellow margins. Stunted plant. Very low yield.
conditions: High whitefly populations. Dry season. Adjacent infected crops.
control: Control whiteflies (Imidacloprid). Yellow sticky traps. Remove infected plants. Use reflective mulch.
